items.caption: An advertisement for a ski resort's "my mountain" program, which offers an all-access pass for the upcoming season. the pass is available for $300, with a special offer to save $300 by november 4th. the program also includes free ski days at various partner ski resorts. the background features a snowy mountain landscape with a skier in action, emphasizing the winter sports theme. the text is overlaid on the image, with the main message in large, bold letters. the logo of the ski resort is visible in the top left corner.
